reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc. in Computer Science - Batch of 2020
reviews_list.review_title: The college is good in terms of services.

review_content.Placements: The placement percentage was around 40 -50%. The top recruiting companies were HCL, Infosys etc. Around 20 -30% of the students got internships in higher-middle companies like HCL, Infosys etc. Top roles offered are the same by all companies, like software engineer, manager and developer.
review_content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is available 24*7, and that's good enough for study purposes. The college building has 2-floors provided with better classrooms, computer labs, a large library, water facilities, and labs like physics and biology that are well-equipped with air-conditioners and all the instruments. The hostel is situated nearly 1 km away from the college. Canteen, mess, parks, sports ground and living facilities are the best in consideration by me. Security is available 24 hours. Separate hostels are available for girls and boys. Proper food is provided in the mess, and clothes are washed every 1-2 days regularly. The college provides all the first-aid facilities and has a medical store. A hospital is present 2 km away, so that's good. Playgrounds for games like cricket, football, volleyball and other indoor games are available.

review_content.Placements: 80 per cent of students were placed in our course. 7-8 Lacs per annum is the lowest package offered in our course. 70-80 per cent of students got an internship.
review_content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, library etc. are available. Hostels and the best quality of food are also available. All sports are available like cricket, basketball, swimming pool, etc.
review_content.Faculty: All teachers are helpful, qualified and knowledgeable and their teaching quality was also good. Semesters are difficult and easy. Semesters are difficult for those who don't study. 80-90 per cent is the pass percentage.

review_content.Placements: In my college, there are 50 to 60 batchmates with me, and the placement my college provides is quite good. You can easily get a job in a local hospital in Bhopal or anywhere. The top roles offered in my course are a medical representative for any company. I can work on manufacturing medicine in a lab for top medical companies.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure was excellent, labs, classrooms, and library are very clean and more spacious, and the facilities like fans, light, and electric supply are impressive. The supporting staff was good, the food in the canteen is hygienic, there is a turf in my college were we can play football, cricket, etc.

review_content.Placements: 80 percent of students are there in the course. I didn't know about the package of the course provided by the institute. Lupin is the best company for the course. I didn't get any internships for any of the students. Pharma is a good option for those who are interested in medicine and drugs.
review_content.Infrastructure: Computer labs, microbiology labs, and various pharmaceutical labs are available on campus, but the instruments and machinery are very low quality and not maintained by anyone. The setup of the bigger machines is not very well; therefore, they get out of order again and again.

I don't have an exact idea about the internship programme but as per the past records, near about 40 percent of students got internship offers during their 3-year course.
content.Infrastructure: Our college has a lovely infrastructure for real. Inside our college, there are absolutely beautiful classrooms, well maintained digital rooms for studies, library is so much customized including the book stock. There are free Wi-Fi facilities for students and teachers both. College hostel is available with every kind of food facilities & medical also.
